brief_summary: Regional vendor grid showing the eight storefronts hosting GMK CYL Pandemonium across the June 1–July 1 window. DeltaKeyCo shown as a larger primary coral-accented card with 'designer-vendor' label. Second row shows Prototypist (APAC), Bowl Keyboards (UK), and Swagkeys (EU). Third row shows Pantheon Keys, Typist Club, Keybay, and a placeholder chip for one additional regional storefront. Footer notes designer-vendor model and doubleshot ABS Cherry profile.
